definition: The inability to control the discharge of urine or feces from the body. It can also refer to a lack of self-restraint or moderation in behavior.
translation: 澶辩锛涘ぇ灏忎究澶辩锛涳紙琛岀偤涓婄殑锛夌己涔忚嚜鍒跺姏
example: After the surgery, the patient experienced temporary incontinence but gradually recovered full bladder control.
